name: GuardDuty detector disabled
description: Amazon GuardDuty is not enabled. Without GuardDuty, there is no threat detection for compromised credentials, cryptocurrency mining, port scanning, DNS exfiltration, or malicious instance behaviour.
remediation: Enable GuardDuty in all regions: aws guardduty create-detector --enable --finding-publishing-frequency FIFTEEN_MINUTES. Enable optional protection plans: S3, EKS, RDS, Lambda, Malware. Configure EventBridge rules to route HIGH/CRITICAL findings to PagerDuty or SNS.
